document.title: Software Development Plan for G Series Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: Software Development Plan Rev.0 for G Series Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector, document no. A-TCF-10-143, dated Jul/01/2024.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports technical documentation for software development planning, classification, requirements, risk management, verification and validation, release, configuration management, and problem handling for the detector software.
keyPoints: The software development process follows Classic waterfall methodology.
Software classification is described under FDA level of concern and EN 62304 software safety classes.
Software requirements cover common functions, image acquisition, calibration, pre-processing, firmware update, firmware modules, cybersecurity, and error control.
Verification and validation are confirmed through software test, including unit test, integration and system test.
Software release requires completed verification, residual abnormality assessment, releasing version documentation, creation procedure documentation, and controlled storage/delivery.
Software configuration changes must be recorded, managed, and validated before application.

concepts.evidence: Software verification and validation shall be confirmed through the software test. The software test shall conduct the unit test, integration and system test.

concepts.name: Traceability analysis
concepts.evidence: As the traceability analysis is an essential element on comprehension of the effective product development, product design, development, testing and risk alleviation, do clear traceability analysis between the related document and development activities.

evidence.claim: The purpose is to develop software that can manipulate and utilize the product function of the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: To use the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector developed, produced and sold by this company according to intention, it aims at developing software that can manipulate and utilize the product function.
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Software

evidence.claim: The plan applies FDA Guide Line level-of-concern classifications Major, Moderate, and Minor.
evidence.evidenceText: S/W is classified into Major, Moderate and Minor by its level of concern

evidence.claim: The plan applies EN 62304 software safety classes A, B, and C.
evidence.evidenceText: The software safety classes shall initially be assigned based on concern as follows: -. Class A: There is no injury nor health damage. -. Class B: The possible harm is non-serious injury. -. Class C: The possible harm is death or serious injury.

evidence.claim: Until a software safety class is assigned, Class C requirements apply for each software system.
evidence.evidenceText: For each software system, until a software safety class is assigned, Class C requirements applied.

evidence.claim: The software development process follows Classic waterfall methodology.
evidence.evidenceText: Software development process of H&abyz Co., Ltd. follows “Classic waterfall methodology", as illustrated in the following chart.

evidence.claim: Development steps include Analysis, Planning, Design, Implementation, Qualification, Maintenance, Software release, and Development plan updated.
evidence.evidenceText: Step Main Contents Development Period Analysis Planning Design Implementation Qualification Maintenance Software release Development plan updated

evidence.claim: Hardware resources identify MCU function as 32Bit Microprocessor and MCU model as Intel Cyclone V.
evidence.evidenceText: Hardware resources Section Resource MCU Function 32Bit Microprocessor MCU Model Intel Cyclone V

evidence.claim: Software resources include Windows 11 64bit and Microsoft Visual Studio 2022 Professional.
evidence.evidenceText: Software resources Section Resource Operation system Windows 11 64bit Compiler Microsoft Visual Studio 2022 Professional / aarch64-poky-linux-gcc / C# Debugging tool Microsoft Visual Studio 2022 Professional Editor tool Microsoft Visual Studio 2022 Professional

evidence.claim: Cybersecurity requirements include Wi-Fi login password access limits and data protection using encryption such as WPA and WPA2.
evidence.evidenceText: Random access should be limited by setting ID and password when accessing the wireless network. Transmission data should be protected by applying encryption such as WPA, WPAPSK, WPA2, WPA2PSK, WPAPSK+TKIP, etc.

evidence.claim: Software risk management requires deciding and analyzing potential risk, reason, probability and severity.
evidence.evidenceText: As for the software risk management, personnel who participated in the program development process shall decide, analyze potential risk, reason, probability and severity of the software.

evidence.claim: If hazard could arise from software system failure to behave as specified, probability of such failure is assumed to be 100 percent under EN 62304:2006/AC:2008 Cl. 4.3 a).
evidence.evidenceText: If the HAZARD could arise from a failure of the SOFTWARE SYSTEM to behave as specified, the probability of such failure shall be assumed to be 100 percent [∵EN 62304:2006/AC:2008, Cl. 4.3 a)].

evidence.claim: Software verification and validation are confirmed through software testing, including unit, integration and system tests.
evidence.evidenceText: Software verification and validation shall be confirmed through the software test. The software test shall conduct the unit test, integration and system test.

evidence.claim: Before software release, verification completion and evaluated results must be ensured.
evidence.evidenceText: It should be ensured that the software verification is completed and that the results are evaluated before releasing the software.

evidence.claim: All identified residual abnormalities should be documented and assessed to ensure they do not cause unacceptable risks.
evidence.evidenceText: All identified residual abnormalities should be documented. In order to ensure that all identified residual abnormalities are not causing unacceptable risks, It should be ensured that such abnormal conditions have been evaluated.

evidence.claim: Software configuration changes should be recorded and managed in the Software Validation Report and validated before application.
evidence.evidenceText: In case the software configuration is changed, it should be recorded, managed on 12. Software Configuration Management of the Software Validation Report. In case the software configuration is changed, it should be validated before it is applied to the software.

evidence.claim: Software issues must be recorded and applicable corrective measures conducted.
evidence.evidenceText: Any issues identified with the software shall be recorded and applicable corrective measures shall be conducted.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is taken from source metadata authoritySignal 'MFDS/domestic'; the document text itself references FDA Guide Line and EN/ISO standards but does not explicitly identify MFDS or a domestic regulatory authority.
Product model is not specified as a discrete model number in the document text; only 'G Series Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector' is stated.
Source path mentions 'G1417MCW 외 7종', but this model signal is not repeated in the document text, so it is not listed as a product model.
The document contains an embedded Korean comment marker '메모 포함[D1]: 이미지 수정 필요', suggesting a possible unresolved editing note.
